main_features.description: Introduction of a new high-frequency, low-overhead statistical sampling profiler along with a dedicated profiling package.
The ability to use unpacking in comprehensions.
UTF-8 is now the default encoding.
A new PyBytesWriter C API for creating Python bytes objects.
Provides performance improvements, specifically 3-4% on x86-64 Linux and 7-8% on AArch64 macOS.
General enhancements to the clarity and detail of error messaging.
